title: quercus × rolfsii
intro: Quercus × rolfsii, also known as the hybrid white oak, is a cross between the bur oak (Quercus macrocarpa) and the white oak (Quercus alba). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant. The health benefits associated with Quercus × rolfsii include its potential to reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and cancer, as well as its ability to support digestive and immune system health. Quercus × rolfsii is often prepared as a tea or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
